name: Charter Hall Social Infrastructure Reit
analysis: CQE has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 20% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry A$2.6700, stop A$2.3859, target A$2.9508 (0.99:1) — then trail it.
